news.title: Nvidia Dropped a Cryptic Clue About Its Next Big Move Ahead of GTC Event

The post read “A new era of PC,” and then listed two numbers which appear to be the coordinates of the Taipei Music Center.  Huang’s presentation is slated to begin on Monday at 11 a.m. Taipei time, which is Sunday at 11 p.m. U.S. Eastern Time.
